title: Nullified Mace
body:
In the player's hand, the Mace will be 3D, using a model I made that fits the vanilla texture and materials used to craft the Mace. With the Polytone mod installed, it will use the vanilla 2D texture in your inventory, in an item frame, or when dropped on the ground.

PLANNED ADDITIONS:
- CIT Resewn compatibility (?) for unique textures/models for different mace enchantments
